The header paragraph should reflect some amount of nuance in regards to modern feminism's stance. Modern feminists consider men's issues a part of feminism, as men are discriminated against for femininity. Destigmatizing femininity has become a hallmark of feminism. Not including this viewpoint is reductionist.
